name: DailyNews Report
description: Daily RSS-based news curation: fetch, filter by interest, generate HTML report

tasks.prompt:
Execute the daily news report workflow:

1. Run `python3 fetch_news.py` to generate today.md and raw HTML
2. Read the interest model from memory/interest_model.md
3. Read today.md for raw news items
4. Read template.html for the HTML report structure
5. Filter news into high-interest (detailed) and low-interest (2-line summary) categories
6. Generate an HTML report following the template structure, save to reports/[today].html
7. Submit the report via mcp__remotelab__submit_report
8. Set label to 'done'
